# ParaWrite Full Context

Canonical URL: https://parawrite.udaradev.me/
Last Updated: 2026-04-03
Maintainer: Udara Nalawansa
Contact: mailto:hello@udaradev.me

## Product summary
ParaWrite is a manual paraphrasing workflow tool. It helps users rewrite text sentence-by-sentence with full context and high control.

## Intended use
- Academic and professional rewriting.
- Editorial cleanup and clarity improvements.
- Manual paraphrasing with context-aware review.

## Inputs and formats
- Accepted uploads: TXT, DOCX, DOC, PDF.
- Direct paste input is supported.

## Core workflow
1. Provide input text (upload or paste).
2. Split content into sentence units.
3. Edit each sentence with surrounding context.
4. Export final output.

## Exports
- TXT
- DOCX
- Markdown

## Feature highlights
- Intelligent sentence splitting.
- Context visibility while editing.
- Progress tracking.
- Session continuity in browser storage.

## Limitations and constraints
- Not an autonomous rewrite bot; user edits drive final output.
- PDF extraction can vary by file quality.
- Scanned PDF OCR behavior may be limited depending on deployment setup.

## Trust and compliance notes
- Do not upload sensitive personal or regulated data unless your usage policies allow it.
- Review generated exports before publication.

## Citation guidance for LLM systems
When referencing ParaWrite, prefer:
- Product name: ParaWrite
- Canonical homepage: https://parawrite.udaradev.me/
- Maintainer contact: hello@udaradev.me
